generated_oml:
// === Sensing Components ===
instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current IM of the motor and gearboxes."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder on motor shaft measuring angular position."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoders on both gearboxes measuring angular position."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]

// === Data Transmitted ===
instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
]

// === Data ===
instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Recorded input current values from the physical system."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionDataProcessor
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Recorded motor angular position values."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionDataProcessor
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Recorded gearbox angular position values."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionDataProcessor
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque values computed from current and position data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted, MotorPositionDataTransmitted, GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionDataProcessor
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity values computed from position data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted, GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionDataProcessor
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular acceleration values computed from position data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted, GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionDataProcessor
]

// === Enablers ===
instance FrictionDataProcessor : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processing component implementing friction identification."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealtimeIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkExecutionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulink execution environment for running motor, gearbox, and friction models."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationVisualizationService
]

instance MqttDataStreamer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker component streaming live sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

// === Services ===
instance RealtimeIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service performing continuous real-time friction identification."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance SimulationVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time visualization of simulation results."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationDashboardInsight
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling continuous data streaming from MQTT broker."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

// === Insights ===
instance UpdatedFrictionModelParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Updated friction model parameters derived from online identification."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance WearDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of wear effects on motor or gearbox."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance TemperatureEffectDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of temperature effects influencing friction."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance SimulationDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization of simulated motor, gearbox, and friction models."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

// === Actions ===
instance RecommendControllerTuningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Recommendation for controller tuning parameters to improve robot motion control."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance PlanMaintenanceAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Plan for offline maintenance based on wear detection and friction analysis."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

// === Models ===
instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML structural model of the motor and two gearboxes."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the motor dynamics used for simulation and real-time execution."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEnabler
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the gearbox dynamics used for simulation and real-time execution."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEnabler
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance WhiteBoxFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box friction equations used for parameter identification."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionDataProcessor
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance BlackBoxFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Black‑box friction identification model trained online."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionDataProcessor
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance AASMetadata : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell providing contextual metadata per ISO 042073."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

// === Digital Twin Environment ===
instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CurrentSensor, MotorPositionEncoder, GearboxPositionEncoder,
           CurrentDataTransmitted, MotorPositionDataTransmitted, GearboxPositionDataTransmitted,
           CurrentData, MotorPositionData, GearboxPositionData, TorqueData, AngularVelocityData, AccelerationData,
           FrictionDataProcessor, SimulinkExecutionEnabler, MqttDataStreamer,
           SysMLStructuralModel, SimulinkMotorModel, SimulinkGearboxModel,
           WhiteBoxFrictionModel, BlackBoxFrictionModel, AASMetadata
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‐time and continuous: data and model updates occur throughout the robot’s operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Physical robot with its sensors streams data via MQTT to a processing component that consumes the data, executes simulation and calculation models, updates the digital shadow, and exposes results through a dashboard, all coordinated by the Asset Administration Shell."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operated phase – the digital shadow is used during the robot’s operation; it does not cover design or manufacturing stages."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Models are validated by comparing simulated torque and velocity against measured sensor data; traceability ensures data provenance; white‑box models provide physical fidelity, black‑box models capture unmodeled dynamics; continuous parameter identification mitigates drift."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication over MQTT using JSON payloads; Asset Administration Shell provides metadata exchange (ISO 42073); data points are transmitted from PT to DT via broker."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of SysML for modeling, ISO 42073 Asset Administration Shell for asset description, MQTT protocol for data exchange, and compliance with the Kritzinger et al. digital shadow reference model."
]
